features.name: class extending type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class where the type parameter is used as the base class to extend

features.name: class extending typedef alias
features.description: Code should include a class extending a typedef alias of another class

features.name: class extending type parameter with override
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class extending a type parameter with the parameter overridden at instantiation

features.name: class extending non-class type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class attempting to extend a non-class type parameter (should produce an error)
